READLINE_DESCRIPTION: Readline library for handling standard input
READLINE_ONLINE_MESSAGE0:
when a line is read from standard input with echo $[ECHO] do
$[CODE]
READLINE_ONLINE_TOOLTIP: Keep reading lines from standard input and run the attached code for each line.
READLINE_KEYVALUE_MESSAGE0:
when a key-value line is read from standard input with echo $[ECHO] do
$[CODE]
READLINE_KEYVALUE_TOOLTIP: Keep reading lines from standard input, parse each as 'key: value', and run the attached code. valueNumber is NaN if the value is not a number.
